code: import api from'./api';export const getGmailStatus=()=>api.get('/gmail/status');export const getGmailConnectUrl=()=>api.get('/gmail/connect');export const sendViaGmail=(to,cc,subject,body)=>api.post('/gmail/send',{to,cc,subject,body});export const disconnectGmail=()=>api.post('/gmail/disconnect');
